changelog: 1.1 (2026-06-26): Re-sliced atomic — one impl task per component operation (OPN), one test task per TST-NNN.
1.0 (2026-06-06): Initial backend-api container task subgraph (gold reference output).

overview: Atomic task subgraph for the backend-api container: package scaffold, the Postgres schema migration, one implementation task per ARCH component operation (OPN), and one test task per TST-NNN in TEST-STRATEGY__backend-api.

tasks.title: Scaffold the backend-api package
tasks.description: Fastify app skeleton, package manifest, Prisma client wiring and the test harness. (Built standalone before the system stitch, so this subgraph carries only same-file dependencies; the system repo-scaffold edge is added when /sdlc:task builds docs/TASKS.json.)
acceptance: pnpm --filter backend-api install resolves
the app boots and serves a health route

tasks.title: Define the Postgres schema and migrations
tasks.description: Author the Prisma schema and initial migration for the Task, Comment and DigestRun entities (the persistence layer the repository binds to). The entity realization task — distinct from the repository code that queries it.
outputs: the Task, Comment and DigestRun tables exist after migrate
acceptance: prisma migrate deploy creates the Task, Comment and DigestRun tables
the schema matches DATA-MODEL.yaml field types

tasks.title: Implement auth-middleware verify-token
tasks.description: Verify the bearer JWT against the OIDC JWKS and reject unauthenticated requests with 401, before routing.
acceptance: a request with a valid token is routed
a request with no/invalid token gets 401

tasks.title: Implement tasks-controller list-tasks
tasks.description: GET /v1/tasks — return the caller's tasks (paginated).
acceptance: GET /v1/tasks returns 200 with the caller's tasks

tasks.title: Implement tasks-controller create-task
tasks.description: POST /v1/tasks — validate the payload, persist a new task, return 201.
acceptance: creating a task returns 201 with a persisted id

tasks.title: Implement tasks-controller update-task
tasks.description: PATCH /v1/tasks/{id} — update a task (e.g. mark done) and persist the new status.
acceptance: marking a task done flips its status and is reflected on next read

tasks.title: Implement comments-controller list-comments
tasks.description: GET comments on a task — return the task's comments.
acceptance: listing comments returns the task's comments

tasks.title: Implement comments-controller create-comment
tasks.description: POST a comment on a task — add a comment and persist it.
acceptance: adding a comment persists it and returns it on the task

tasks.title: Implement digest-settings-controller get-digest-settings
tasks.description: GET the current digest schedule and recent runs (newest-first).
acceptance: recent digest runs are listed newest-first

tasks.title: Implement digest-settings-controller update-digest-settings
tasks.description: PATCH the digest schedule — enable/disable the digest and set the send time; persist it.
acceptance: enabling the digest and setting a send time persists and reads back

tasks.title: Implement persistence-repository write-row
tasks.description: Insert or update a Task, Comment or DigestRun row via Prisma.
acceptance: Task, Comment and DigestRun rows can be written

tasks.title: Implement persistence-repository read-row
tasks.description: Read a Task, Comment or DigestRun row (or list) via Prisma.
acceptance: Task, Comment and DigestRun rows can be read back

tasks.title: Unit test: tasks-controller creates a task (TST-001)
tasks.description: Realize TST-001 — happy-path create on the tasks controller.
acceptance: the test realizing TST-001 passes

tasks.title: Unit test: tasks-controller marks a task done (TST-002)
tasks.description: Realize TST-002 — status transition on the tasks controller.
acceptance: the test realizing TST-002 passes

tasks.title: Unit test: comments-controller adds a comment (TST-003)
tasks.description: Realize TST-003 — happy-path comment add.
acceptance: the test realizing TST-003 passes

tasks.title: Unit test: digest-settings saves and reads schedule (TST-004)
tasks.description: Realize TST-004 — digest enable/disable + send-time round trip.
acceptance: the test realizing TST-004 passes

tasks.title: Integration test: repository round-trips a task (TST-005)
tasks.description: Realize TST-005 — repository + a real test Postgres round-trip.
acceptance: a written Task reads back identically

tasks.title: Security test: forged JWT is rejected (TST-006)
tasks.description: Realize TST-006 — abuse case for the jwt-forgery concern.
acceptance: a forged/expired token yields 401 and never reaches a controller

tasks.title: Security test: no PII in logs (TST-007)
tasks.description: Realize TST-007 — scan emitted logs for the raw email / comment body.
acceptance: no log line contains the raw email or comment body

tasks.title: Integration test: postgres outage is handled (TST-008)
tasks.description: Realize TST-008 — negative case for the postgres-unavailable failure mode.
acceptance: a DB outage surfaces as a retried then graceful 503
